actionsTab.title: Connect to a screen
actionsTab.description: This will allow to navigate between screens in the preview mode.

helperText.onlyButtonsAndText: Only buttons or text components can be connected to a screen.
helperText.onlyInsideScreen: Only components inside a screen can be connected to another screen.

order.title: Order
order.description: Change the order of selected components in the board.

alignment.title: Alignment
alignment.description: Align selected components in the board.
